response.justification: Bogdan has strong backend and distributed systems experience, including real-time low-latency systems and microservices, which aligns well with the fintech and agentic AI architecture needs. However, his background lacks direct production experience with multi-agent AI systems, fintech infrastructure, or regulated commercial environments. His recent AI-agent contributions at re:cinq are promising but not yet proven at scale. Leadership experience scaling teams is limited to smaller organizations.
strengths: Strong backend and distributed systems expertise with real-time low-latency systems
Demonstrated experience with event-driven architectures and microservices
Proven ability to build and maintain scalable, production-grade systems across multiple languages
concerns: No direct production experience with multi-agent AI systems or fintech infrastructure
Limited experience operating AI systems in regulated or high-stakes commercial environments
Leadership experience primarily in smaller organizations, not VP/Executive-level scaling
